creator: hokan@me.umn.edu
text:
Thunderbird fails to log into mail server, does not display contents of local mailboxes.  prefs.js is polluted by references to amd-mounted directory names, rather than conventional directory names.  So items in my .thunderbird profile that should say:
/h/hokan/.thunderbird/sx03ah5r.default/ImapMail/mail.hokan.org
instead say
/.amd_mnt/enet-hs12/export/homes/home00/hokan/.thunderbird/sx03ah5r.default/ImapMail/mail.hokan.org

How-To-Repeat: Use a home directory that is mounted by amd from an NFS server?
